subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #056 The Outwards and Inward Powers of Man
subcodes.first_line: There are five outward material powers in man which are the means of perception
subcodes.first_line_orig: در انسان قوای خمسهء ظاهرهء جسمانیه موجود و این قوی واسطهء ادراک است
subcodes.subjects: @mind as intermediary between soul and body
